name: Moroccan Couscous
recipeInstructions:
Bring juice and 1 cup water to a boil in a small pot. Remove from heat.
Stir in couscous and allow to sit covered for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a separate pan, saute dates, raisins, almonds and cinnamon in 1 cup water for 2 minutes. Add cooked couscous. Mix well and serve warm.
Makes 4 servings. Per serving: 301 calories, 8 grams protein, 59 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fat, 0 grams saturated fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 7 milligrams sodium.
